provisions.heading: Briefing on hypersonic test infrastructure
provisions.text: The committee directs the Secretary of the Air Force to provide a briefing to the congressional defense committees not later than March 1, 2027, on the plan to expand hypersonic ground-test infrastructure.

provisions.heading: Increase for long-range fires development
provisions.text: The committee recommends an increase of $25.0 million for the long-range fires program element to accelerate prototype development.

provisions.heading: Limitation on retirement of legacy platform
provisions.text: None of the funds authorized to be appropriated by this Act may be obligated or expended to retire the legacy platform until the Secretary certifies that a replacement capability has reached initial operational capability.

provisions.heading: Program element overview
provisions.text: This program element funds the continued development and integration of the next-generation sensor suite across the future years defense program.
